query: SELECT inscricao, tipo, tributo, competencia, situacao, valorOriginal, multa, juros, encargos, totalDevido, observacoes FROM passivoTributario ORDER BY CAST(COALESCE(totalDevido, valorOriginal, 0) AS DECIMAL) DESC;
